mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_task ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_task (task_name, task_desc, executor_id, prompt_template, agent_role, agent_rules, command, cron_expression, timeout_seconds, retry_count, status, depend_task_id, alarm_email) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskDesc}, #{executorId}, #{promptTemplate}, #{agentRole}, #{agentRules}, #{command}, #{cronExpression}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{retryCount}, #{status}, #{dependTaskId}, #{alarmEmail})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task SET task_name = #{taskName}, task_desc = #{taskDesc}, executor_id = #{executorId}, prompt_template = #{promptTemplate}, agent_role = #{agentRole}, agent_rules = #{agentRules}, command = #{command}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, status = #{status}, depend_task_id = #{dependTaskId}, alarm_email = #{alarmEmail} WHERE id = #{id}
